seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tarra Valley and Tarranyurk. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tarra Valley vs Tarranyurk: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tarra Valley and Tarranyurk.
heading: Tarra Valley vs Tarranyurk — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tarra Valley, Victoria and Tarranyurk, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarranyurk has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Tarra Valley (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tarra Valley or Tarranyurk safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tarra Valley has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Tarranyurk scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tarra Valley scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Tarranyurk scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tarra Valley or Tarranyurk?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarranyurk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
